location: Inside a treasure chest on an abandoned carriage at the edge of a collapsed bridge, south of the Liurnia Highway South Site of Grace in Liurnia of the Lakes; a wandering Troll patrols the area.

source.name: Chest on the carriage near the collapsed bridge

tactics: From the Liurnia Highway South grace, follow the road south toward the collapsed bridge and abandoned carriage.
A Troll patrols nearby - it's slow, so you can grab the chest and retreat rather than fighting it if you're underleveled.
The chest is a simple ground pickup with no fog gate or boss required, making it an easy early-game grab.
lore: A gilded, tree-shaped spear issued to the knights who guard Leyndell's royal palaces, carrying holy damage befitting its ceremonial origin as elite capital-guard equipment.

builds.name: Dexterity/Faith Holy Build
builds.why: Dexterity carries the highest scaling on this spear, and its unusual rapid thrust combo rewards a nimble Dex/Faith build chasing holy damage.

builds.name: Quality-Faith Tri-Stat
builds.why: Modest requirements in all three stats suit a balanced quality-faith build wanting holy damage without committing fully to a pure caster.
